originalTitle: LG’s glossy OLED gaming monitor is rare to find under $400
summary: If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your gaming monitor, LG’s 27-inch 27GX704A-B pairs a glossy WOLED panel with a fast refresh rate, and it’s currently on sale for $379.99 (about $70 off) at Amazon and directly from LG, marking a new low price. It originally launched at $799.99, but has been available for under $500 since […]
content: If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your gaming monitor, LG’s 27-inch 27GX704A-B pairs a glossy WOLED panel with a fast refresh rate, and it’s currently on sale for $379.99 (about $70 off) at Amazon and directly from LG, marking a new low price. It originally launched at $799.99, but has been available for under $500 since May. [Product: LG UltraGear Glossy OLED gaming monitor (27-inches) | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FNQ4B2Z2?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.lg.com/us/monitors/lg-27gx704a-b-gaming-monitor] The monitor offers a 1440p resolution and a glossy coating, which isn’t a combination of specs we often see at this price. Most OLED monitors under $400 use QD-OLED panels, which can give blacks a slight bluish tint. LG’s WOLED monitor delivers truer-looking blacks while the glossy coating helps colors appear richer and more vibrant. It doesn’t sacrifice speed, either. The monitor boasts a fast 240Hz refresh rate with variable refresh rate support (Nvidia G-Sync compatible and AMD FreeSync Premium Pro), along with a fast 0.03ms response time to keep games looking sharp in motion.  It comes with a solid array of ports for the price, with two HDMI 2.1 ports, DisplayPort 1.4, and USB-A ports, making it easy to connect a PC, consoles, and accessories. Rounding things out, the stand is fully adjustable, too, allowing you to raise, lower, tilt, swivel, or rotate the display into portrait mode for a more comfortable setup. Or, because it has a VESA mount, you can yank it off and toss it onto a monitor arm of your choice.
chineseTitle: LG 的光面 OLED 游戏显示器很少低于 400 美元
chineseSummary: 如果您一直在考虑升级您的游戏显示器，LG 的 27 英寸 27GX704A-B 配备了具有快速刷新率的光面 WOLED 面板，目前它在亚马逊上直接从 LG 处以 379.99 美元（约折扣 70 美元）的价格出售，创下了新的低价。它最初的售价为 799.99 美元，但自从 [...]
chineseContent: 如果您一直在考虑升级您的游戏显示器，LG 的 27 英寸 27GX704A-B 配备了具有快速刷新率的光面 WOLED 面板，目前它在亚马逊上直接从 LG 处以 379.99 美元（约折扣 70 美元）的价格出售，创下了新的低价。 它最初的售价为 799.99 美元，但自 5 月份以来价格已低于 500 美元。 [产品：LG UltraGear 光面 OLED 游戏显示器（27 英寸）| https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FNQ4B2Z2?tag=theverge02-20，https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.lg.com/us/monitors/lg-27gx704a-b-gaming-monitor]该显示器提供1440p分辨率和光泽涂层，这不是我们经常以这个价格看到的规格组合。大多数 400 美元以下的 OLED 显示器都使用 QD-OLED 面板，这会使黑色呈现轻微的蓝色调。 LG 的 WOLED 显示器可呈现更真实的黑色，而光面涂层则有助于色彩显得更丰富、更鲜艳。它也不会牺牲速度。该显示器拥有 240Hz 快速刷新率，支持可变刷新率（兼容 Nvidia G-Sync 和 AMD FreeSync Premium Pro），以及 0.03 毫秒的快速响应时间，让游戏在运动中看起来更加清晰。  它配备了一系列物美价廉的端口，包括两个 HDMI 2.1 端口、DisplayPort 1.4 和 USB-A 端口，可以轻松连接 PC、游戏机和配件。更重要的是，支架也是完全可调的，允许您升高、降低、倾斜、旋转或旋转显示屏至纵向模式，以获得更舒适的设置。或者，由于它具有 VESA 安装座，因此您可以将其拉下来并将其扔到您选择的显示器臂上。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
